tasks.title: Simplify 'ralph task build' to 'ralph task' alias
evidence: User request: 'I want to simplify the 'ralph task build' command to be invoked via 'ralph task'
plan: Make 'build' the default subcommand under 'ralph task' (i.e., 'ralph task <args>' behaves like 'ralph task build <args>')
Keep 'ralph task build' as an explicit alias for backward compatibility
Update help text to show 'ralph task' as primary usage
Update AGENTS.md and .ralph/README.md documentation
Run make ci to verify changes
tasks.request: I want to simplify the 'ralph task build' command to be invoked via 'ralph task'

tasks.title: Verify and consolidate refactored codebase
evidence: After refactoring large files, need to verify functionality and consolidate any redundant code
User request: 'Several files in this project are thousand of lines long. We need to refactor while maintaing the same functionality.'
plan: Run full test suite with make ci
Check for duplicate code across newly created modules
Consolidate any shared utilities that emerged during refactoring
Update module documentation (docstrings) for new modules
Verify all imports are clean and minimal
Check for any remaining files >800 lines that may need further splitting
Update CLAUDE.md if any project structure guidance changed
tasks.request: Several files in this project are thousand of lines long. We need to refactor while maintaing the same functionality. Smaller file sizes are easier to maintain and find what is needed. Also easier to make sure we are not violating DRY and YAGNI principals. Create several tasks to completely tackle this effort. use the queue fields at your disposal to ensure this is done logically.

tasks.title: Optimize validate_queue_set for large done files
evidence: validate_queue_set is slow with large done.json files
User request: 'New Tasks (Top 10): 7. RQ-0139: Optimize validate_queue_set for large done files (Medium)'
plan: Profile current validation to identify bottlenecks
Use HashSet for ID deduplication check instead of nested loops
Add streaming validation for very large files
Add benchmark tests for validation performance
tasks.request: New Tasks (Top 10): 7. RQ-0139: Optimize validate_queue_set for large done files (Medium)

tasks.title: Implement 'ralph task edit' command
evidence: No way to edit existing tasks from CLI
User request: 'New Tasks (Top 10): 8. RQ-0141: Implement ralph task edit command (Medium)'
plan: Add task edit subcommand with --id flag
Support editing title, status, priority, tags via flags
Support $EDITOR for full task JSON editing
Add tests for edit operations
tasks.request: New Tasks (Top 10): 8. RQ-0141: Implement 'ralph task edit' command (Medium)

tasks.title: Support 'draft' task status
evidence: Need a way to create tasks that aren't ready to run
User request: 'New Tasks (Top 10): 9. RQ-0147: Support draft task status (Medium)'
plan: Add 'draft' to task status enum
Filter draft tasks out of 'run one' and 'run loop' by default
Add --include-draft flag to run commands
Add 'ralph task ready' command to promote draft to todo
Add tests for draft task behavior
